option.name: originalContent
option.value:
version: '3.8'
services: db: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: analyst_lens_db environment: POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-analyst} POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-change_me} POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-analyst_lens} ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-analyst}"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped # Resource limits for production deploy: resources: limits: cpus: '1' memory: 1G reservations: cpus: '0.5' memory: 512M
api: build: context: . dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: analyst_lens_api environment: AL_DATABASE_URL: ${AL_DATABASE_URL} AL_SECRET_KEY: ${AL_SECRET_KEY} AL_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES: ${AL_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES:-120} OPENAI_API_KEY: ${OPENAI_API_KEY:-} ports: - "8000:8000" depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy restart: unless-stopped # Health check healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8000/health"] interval: 30s timeout: 10s retries: 3 start_period: 40s # Resource limits deploy: resources: limits: cpus: '2' memory: 2G reservations: cpus: '1' memory: 1G # Additional security security_opt: - no-new-privileges:true read_only_root_filesystem: true tmpfs: - /tmp - /run
frontend: build: context: ./frontend dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: analyst_lens_frontend environment: API_BASE_URL: http://api:8000 STREAMLIT_SERVER_HEADLESS: true STREAMLIT_SERVER_PORT: 8501 STREAMLIT_SERVER_ADDRESS: 0.0.0.0 ports: - "8501:8501" depends_on: - api restart: unless-stopped # Health check healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8501/_stcore/health"] interval: 30s timeout: 10s retries: 3 start_period: 40s # Resource limits deploy: resources: limits: cpus: '1' memory: 1G reservations: cpus: '0.5' memory: 512M # Streamlit specific configuration volumes: - ~/.streamlit:/home/appuser/.streamlit:ro security_opt: - no-new-privileges:true
volumes: pgdata: driver: local

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
version: '3.8'
services: db: image: postgres:16-alpine container_name: analyst_lens_db environment: POSTGRES_USER: ${POSTGRES_USER:-analyst} POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${POSTGRES_PASSWORD:-change_me} POSTGRES_DB: ${POSTGRES_DB:-analyst_lens} ports: - "5432:5432" volumes: - pgdata:/var/lib/postgresql/data healthcheck: test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U ${POSTGRES_USER:-analyst}"] interval: 5s timeout: 5s retries: 5 restart: unless-stopped # Resource limits for production deploy: resources: limits: cpus: '1' memory: 1G reservations: cpus: '0.5' memory: 512M
api: build: context: . dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: analyst_lens_api environment: AL_DATABASE_URL: ${AL_DATABASE_URL} AL_SECRET_KEY: ${AL_SECRET_KEY} AL_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES: ${AL_ACCESS_TOKEN_EXPIRE_MINUTES:-120} AL_AI_MODE: ${AL_AI_MODE:-mock} OPENAI_API_KEY: ${OPENAI_API_KEY:-} ports: - "8000:8000" depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy restart: unless-stopped # Health check healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8000/health"] interval: 30s timeout: 10s retries: 3 start_period: 40s # Resource limits deploy: resources: limits: cpus: '2' memory: 2G reservations: cpus: '1' memory: 1G # Additional security security_opt: - no-new-privileges:true read_only_root_filesystem: true tmpfs: - /tmp - /run
frontend: build: context: ./frontend dockerfile: Dockerfile container_name: analyst_lens_frontend environment: API_BASE_URL: http://api:8000 STREAMLIT_SERVER_HEADLESS: true STREAMLIT_SERVER_PORT: 8501 STREAMLIT_SERVER_ADDRESS: 0.0.0.0 ports: - "8501:8501" depends_on: - api restart: unless-stopped # Health check healthcheck: test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:8501/_stcore/health"] interval: 30s timeout: 10s retries: 3 start_period: 40s # Resource limits deploy: resources: limits: cpus: '1' memory: 1G reservations: cpus: '0.5' memory: 512M # Streamlit specific configuration volumes: - ~/.streamlit:/home/appuser/.streamlit:ro security_opt: - no-new-privileges:true
volumes: pgdata: driver: local
